templates.name: Opportunity: NPN Stage: Booked Status: Open

attributes.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Your initial medical evaluation at Men’s Wellness Centers {{contact.location}} has been scheduled for {{appointment.start_time}}.

This time has been reserved specifically for you.

To officially secure your visit, please confirm your appointment using the button below.
{{trigger_link.InI8MiYE24HtvPLNLvel}}

templates.name: Send SMS to ask Patient to confirm

attributes.body:
{{contact.first_name}}, your Men’s Wellness consultation is set for {{appointment.start_time}} ({{contact.preferred_location}}).

We’re a physician-led men’s clinic focused on energy and performance. Your hour includes a provider consult, same-day labs and comprehensive review with your provider.

Reply Y to confirm.

Questions? Call or text (866) 344-4955.
Reply STOP to opt out.

attributes.subject: Action Required: Confirm Your Appointment Request | {{appointment.start_time}} ({{appointment.timezone}})

attributes.html:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},


This email confirms that your appointment scheduled for {{appointment.start_time}} ({{appointment.timezone}}) has been successfully cancelled.


If your plans change, you can schedule a new appointment HERE.


If there’s anything we can assist you with, call or text us at 866-344-4955.


We appreciate you letting us know in advance.



Sincerely,

Men's Wellness Center
attributes.subject: Appointment Cancelled: Men's Wellness Centers {{contact.preferred_location}} | {{appointment.start_time}} ({{appointment.timezone}})

attributes.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, we’ve confirmed the cancellation of your appointment on {{appointment.start_time}}.

If your plans change, you’re welcome to schedule a new visit here:
https://menswellnesscenters.com/book-a-consultation/

We’re here if you need anything.

attributes.html:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},


We did not receive confirmation for your appointment today at {{appointment.start_time}}. We understand that things come up, and we’d be happy to help you reschedule at a time that works better for you.


Schedule your new appointment HERE. Have Questions? Call (757) 612-4420.




Sincerely,

{{location.name}}
